rationale: Keep: the two papers are tightly aligned in topic and method (eye-tracking in choice-based conjoint, information search/fixations linked to choice and utilities), and the citing study’s laptop replication details (n=70, 20 tasks, 4 alternatives) closely match the cited paper’s core dataset description.
